IKEA laundry
and cleaning


   We want to offer complete, affordable
   and functional laundry solutions,
   meaning laundry furniture and
    accessories that support every activity
    in the laundry flow. To make cleaning
   your clothes and home easier, we
    offer a wide choice of durable,
    affordable, space-saving and highly
    functional products.

The difference between an organized laundry area and complete chaos is simply:
a great storage solution. And it doesn't hurt if it looks good, too. Whether you
have a spacious laundry room, a bathroom, a basement or a closet at your
disposal, there is a functional, affordable solution for your specific situation.
